name: chain_the_fastest_path_to_5kmonth_isnt_a_re
method: the fastest path to $5k/month isn't a revolutionary idea. it's a boring tool that saves someone 4 hours a week. here's how to find one tonight everyone on this sub wants to start. the thing that stops

stages.task: Scan r/SaaS, r/microsaas, r/Entrepreneur, r/smallbusiness, r/sideproject for posts describing repetitive manual tasks with time estimates (4+ hrs/wk)
Score each hit by: hours_wasted_mentioned, complaint_volume, willingness_to_pay_signals, existing_solution_gaps, buildability_with_app_factory
Route top scoring opportunities into app_factory_priority_queue.json with PRD-ready specs
